metadata.description: Personal Claude Code skills: doc-sync, code-doc-audit, ship.

plugins.name: doc-sync
plugins.description: Verify documentation line references and code examples against current source code.

plugins.name: code-doc-audit
plugins.description: Audit docs and inline comments for concept/design/implementation accuracy. Pairs with doc-sync.

plugins.name: ship
plugins.description: Commit any staged/unstaged changes, push the current branch, and open a PR summarizing all commits since main.
